content.en:
Soon.

The fifth game begins.

Then.

Ye Tiancai found out that his fifth opponent turned out to be the other side of the Holy Mountain, the Lord of Heavenly Crossing!

"Trouble!"

Ye Tian knew that he might not be the opponent of the Lord of Tiandu.

Because this Lord of the Heavenly Crossing is really powerful!

Rumble!!!

The Lord of Tiandu's body began to transform into gold on the other side.

In the blink of an eye, nearly seventy percent of his body had completed the golden embodiment on the other side.

Then, he took a high-level divine soldier long knife on the other side, and performed a magic skill on the other side, slashing it with one sword.

"The Golden Mangs on the other side!"

Ye Tian tried to fend off the opponent's attack.

But in the middle of a touch.

Click!

The golden mangs on the other side were crushed.

The golden cover on the other side was also shattered by the force of the opponent's blow.

At the critical moment, he still relied on the misty body on the other side to avoid most of the injuries.

However, he was injured anyway.

Abrupt.

The eyes of the Lord of Tiandu burst into a ray of light, and Ye Tian was frozen.

Moment of truth.

Ye Tian admitted defeat.

He couldn't beat the Lord of the Heavenly Crossing, he felt that it was normal.

How long has he been cultivating, and how long has the Lord of the Heavenly Crossing been cultivating?

The Lord of the Heavenly Crossing is the other side of the Sacred Mountain's Nine Bone Transformation Realm, and he doesn't know how many primeval epochs have passed since he became a genius on the other side, even in millions of primeval epochs and tens of millions of primeval epochs.

When he completes the golden body of the other side and creates the top supernatural power of the other side, he will also be able to fight with the Lord of Tiandu.

Although he lost one game, he also won four games.

So, if nothing else, he was able to finish in the top 10.

Soon after, the battles of the other other Shore-level geniuses were also over.

Then.

The Lord of the Ice Rim began to announce the results.

He announced the names of the ten other shore-level geniuses one by one, and Ye Tian was one of them.

......

"The Lord of Endless won the top ten in the Eternal Genius Competition, which is equivalent to making Gu Hengshan lose face. "

The Lord of Eternal Zero said excitedly.

As the mountain lord of Guheng Mountain, the lord of Guheng is also in a good mood.

Although it is not his own son who enters the top ten, but the other side of Gu Heng Mountain's genius can enter the top ten, which is also good for Gu Heng Mountain!

Only the Lord of the Ancient Void had some unpleasant feelings in his heart, but he didn't think too much about it.

After all, Ye Tian is really stronger than him, this is an undeniable fact.

After the Eternal Genius Tournament ended, those Beyond Geniuses who did not enter the top ten were brought back one by one.

And Ye Tian stayed.

After all, he still wants that great opportunity!

And the Lord of Eternal Zero came with him, so he stayed here.

It didn't take long for ten other shore-level geniuses to gather together.

There are other beings beyond the Bone Transformation Realm, which are also here.

At this time, the Lord of Chaos spoke: "Presumably you still don't know what the opportunity is this time, and the reason why you don't disclose it is to prevent the news from leaking. This time, the news was not made public as far as the seventy-two eastern realms of our eternal land. Now that the quota has been selected, it can be made public. "

"A long time ago, a strange treasure appeared somewhere, and this treasure land was located in a special time and space. Later, we found out that only the other side level geniuses of the Bone Transformation Realm could enter, and they had to hold a special token, otherwise they would not be able to enter. "

"And there are only ten of that kind of tokens, so there is this time on the other side of the talent competition. "

As soon as the Lord of Chaos said this, Ye Tian and the others completely understood.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and each of their other shore-level geniuses obtained a token, as well as some other shore source stones, which was also one of the rewards.

"Thousands of other source stones, this reward is really rich!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

As for the token, he didn't know how much it was worth, so he couldn't get excited.

Or the source stone on the other side, is the real reward!

"That treasure land, let your elders take it!"

The Lord of Chaos Dao.

With that, the Lord of Chaos left.

......

The Lord of Eternal Zero left the Holy City on the other side with Ye Tian.

On the road.

The Lord of Eternal Zero said, "Lord of Endless, I will take you to that treasure land. "

"Lord of Eternal Zero, why would the Lord of Chaos be willing to give up those tokens?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Lord of Eternal Zero smiled and said, "Although the Lord of Chaos is powerful, and the Holy Mountain on the other side is also very powerful, after all, it can't fight against the top forces in the seventy-two regions, and besides, that treasure land was discovered together, and the Holy Mountain on the other side can't be occupied." Later, more and more Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors arrived, and the news could not be hidden. Everyone sat down and discussed, and decided to hold a talent competition on the other side, so as to decide the number of places. By the way, when you come out, after a long time, the tokens will be scattered again. However, it was a long time later. "

"The Origin Realm is the realm above the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

This was the first time he had heard the name of this realm.

"Yes!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero, "The Origin Realm is the realm above the Nine Bone Transformation Realms. "

At this time, Ye Tian was very curious about the Origin Realm, so he asked casually: "Lord of Eternal Zero, how can the Nine Bone Transformation Realm break through to the Origin Realm?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero did not hide it, and said directly: "If the Nine Bone Transformation Realm wants to become the Origin Realm, you must comprehend the ordinary origin rules of the land on the other side of eternity. And the genius of the other side must comprehend the rules of the origin of the other side. Therefore, it is even more difficult for a genius on the other side to break through, but once he breaks through, his strength is unimaginably strong!"

"For example, after comprehending the origin rules of the land on the other side of eternity in the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, you can condense the Origin Origin, let the whole body originate, and finally step into the Origin Realm and give birth to the Origin Sea. And what the other shore level genius does is to transform the whole body into the other shore, so that the other shore origin sea is born in the body. "

"The cultivation of the Origin Realm is to constantly comprehend the Origin Rules or the Origin Rules of the Other Side, once the rule realm is high, the Origin will continue to grow, and the cultivation will become higher and higher. "

"Of course, you are still far away from the Origin Realm, don't think too much about it first, try to improve your cultivation as much as possible, and create the magic power of the other side. After you break through to the Ninth Bone Transformation Realm, then think about the Origin Realm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Time passes.

After some time, the Lord of Eternal Zero took Ye Tian to a special territory.

Rumble!!!!

Time and space are shattered.

The Lord of Eternal Zero took Ye Tian to constantly shuttle through time and space, and finally arrived at a special space-time area.

Over here.

The other nine other Shore-level geniuses also came here under the leadership of their elders.
